The planet whose degrees are the highest is the Atmakaraka
(Signifk:ator of Soul}. The second highest is the Amatya Karaka
CSignificator of ministerial position). The third highest iS Bhratri Karalca.
The fourth highest is Matri Karaka. Fifth is Pitri Karaka. Sixth highest iS
Putra Karaka. Seventh is the Nati Karaka and the planet whose longitude
is the least becomes the Oara or Stree Karaka.
Note: Fer considering the Variable Karnkas Ketu is not <Xlf\Sidffed. That is.. Oflfy
eight planets. Sun to Rahu are to be consittefed.
In the above example Karakas can be tabulated as below. This
means that Mercury whose degrees are the highest i.e. 13°13', becomes
the Atmakamka. Similarly other Karakas are detennined. The reader'S
will also notice that the degrees traversed by Rahu in a sign are considered
starting from 30 degrees. This is so because Rahu is always retrograde.
